changes.name: Overview
changes.description: The full SDK ships as `@zero-server/sdk` — install that and you have everything. Each section of the framework is also published as a narrow scoped package that re-exports just its surface from the SDK and pins to the same version. Mix and match freely.

changes.name: Package Map
changes.description: Every published `@zero-server/*` package and the surface it narrows to. The full list of exports per package is generated from `.tools/scope-manifest.js` and published to `docs/scopes/<name>.md`.
